PowerShell($candidates = @\('C:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\jbr', 'C:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\jre', 'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Android\\Android Studio\\jbr', 'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Android\\Android Studio\\jre'\); foreach \($p in $candidates\) { if \(Test-Path "$p\\bin\\javac.exe"\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } })
